description_long: This is a medium-sized, brown leather handbag with a structured, angular silhouette and a rugged, utilitarian design. The front features two prominent vertical straps with metal buckles, and a large flap that covers the main compartment, secured by additional buckles. There are multiple pockets, including a side pouch with a snap closure and a zippered compartment, providing ample storage and organization. The bag is equipped with a single, wide adjustable shoulder strap, attached with reinforced stitching and metal hardware for durability. The back of the bag is plain except for a rectangular stitched patch, possibly for branding or reinforcement. The overall appearance is robust and practical, suitable for everyday urban use or travel.
description: A brown leather handbag with multiple buckled straps, side pockets, and a wide adjustable shoulder strap, designed for durability and utility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main flap with two vertical buckled straps and a large front pocket.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bag, side pocket with snap closure, and visible zippers.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain surface with a stitched rectangular patch and minimal detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side pocket and the layered structure of the compartments.
attribute_strap_type: Single wide adjustable shoulder strap, attached with metal hardware and reinforced stitching.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Main flap with dual buckle closures, additional zippers and snap buttons for pockets.
attribute_decorative_elements: Metal buckles and hardware; no other decorative elements.
